from apex.backend.routers.auth import router as auth_router

print\(f'Login: {AUTH_LOGIN_RATE_LIMIT}'\)

print\('All imports OK'\)
")
Bash(APEX_DEV_MODE=true python -c "from apex.backend.main import app; print\(''App OK''\); print\(''Routes:'', [r.path for r in app.routes if hasattr\(r, ''path''\)][-5:]\)")
Bash(RAILWAY_PUBLIC_DOMAIN=apex-prod.up.railway.app python -c "from apex.backend.config import CORS_ORIGINS; print\('CORS:', CORS_ORIGINS\)" 2>&1)

Bash(APEX_DEV_MODE=true PORT=8095 python << 'PYEOF' 2>&1
import uvicorn, threading, time, httpx

from apex.backend.main import app

def run\(\):
    uvicorn.run\(app, host='127.0.0.1', port=8095, log_level='error'\)

t = threading.Thread\(target=run, daemon=True\)
t.start\(\)
time.sleep\(4\)

c = httpx.Client\(base_url='http://127.0.0.1:8095', timeout=10\)

lr = c.post\('/api/auth/login', json={'email': 'demo@apex.com', 'password': 'demo1234'}\)
if lr.status_code != 200:
    c.post\('/api/auth/register', json={'email': 'demo@apex.com', 'password': 'demo1234', 'full_name': 'Demo'}\)
    lr = c.post\('/api/auth/login', json={'email': 'demo@apex.com', 'password': 'demo1234'}\)
token = lr.json\(\).get\('access_token', ''\)
h = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'}

pr = c.post\('/api/projects', headers=h, json={'name': 'PDF Check'}\)
pid = pr.json\(\).get\('data', {}\).get\('id'\)

pdf = c.get\(f'/api/exports/projects/{pid}/estimate/pdf', headers=h\)
print\(f'RESULT: status={pdf.status_code} ct={pdf.headers.get\("content-type", "?"\)} size={len\(pdf.content\)}'\)
PYEOF)
